indicators.name: no bed or resting surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a bed or any resting surface makes this space unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: open office layout
indicators.rationale: The open office layout with desks and chairs facing each other creates a high-disturbance environment.

indicators.name: bright artificial lighting
indicators.rationale: Bright artificial lighting is incompatible with sleep.

reasoning_summary: This is an open office space with no resting surface or furniture suitable for sleep. The bright artificial lighting and open layout make it unsuitable for sleep.
